profile.no_name_warning: ⚠️ Update your name to appear in Explore

notifications_modal.title: Notifications
notifications_modal.subtitle: Manage your notification preferences
notifications_modal.new_matches_desc: Get notified when you match with someone
notifications_modal.connection_requests_desc: Get notified when someone wants to connect

support_modal.title: Support & Help
support_modal.subtitle: Report a problem or get help
support_modal.success_desc: We will review your report and get back to you.
support_modal.error: Please fill in all required fields

collection.title: 1. Data Collection
collection.content: We collect information you provide when creating your profile, including your name, age, gender, photos, interests, and location. We also collect usage data to improve the service.

usage.title: 2. Data Usage
usage.content: Your data is used to match you with compatible users, display your profile to others, send notifications, and improve our matching algorithms. We never sell your personal data to third parties.

sharing.title: 3. Data Sharing
sharing.content: Your profile information is shared with other users as part of the matching service. We may share anonymized data with analytics providers. Your exact location is only shared with users you have mutually connected with.

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.content: We use industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect your data. All communications are encrypted in transit. We regularly audit our security practices.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.content: You can access, update, or delete your personal data at any time through your profile settings. You can request a copy of all data we hold about you by contacting support.

contact.title: 6. Contact
contact.content: For privacy-related questions, please contact us through the Support & Help section or via our Facebook page.
